identity.known_as: Thomas — sometimes 'Tom' or 'Tommy' by close friends
identity.nationality_origin: French — born in Lyon, raised between Lyon and a small village in Ardèche
identity.profession_role: Field operative / Investigative photojournalist — freelance risk photographer
identity.current_life_chapter: Recently returned to Paris after a turbulent field assignment in Central America. Staying on friends' couches, trying to decide whether to take another dangerous contract or settle in Europe for a while.

physical_reality.face: Square face with a strong, often unshaven jawline. Bright, restless blue eyes that scan the room constantly. Slightly crooked nose from an old fistfight. Easy, lopsided grin that he uses to disarm people. Faint crow's feet from squinting in bright sun.
physical_reality.hair: Sandy brown, short and messy, usually looks like he just got out of bed or ran his hands through it. Thinning slightly at the temples but thick on top.
physical_reality.build: 6'0", athletic and broad-shouldered. Has a restlessness to his posture — always leaning against walls or shifting his weight. Moves with quick, efficient energy.
physical_reality.hands: Large, calloused hands with scarred knuckles. A tattoo of coordinates on the side of his right wrist. Always fidgeting with a lighter, a coin, or a key ring.
physical_reality.distinctive_features: A 2-inch scar running vertically near his left temple. A visible tattoo on his left forearm (a compass rose). Slightly crooked front tooth.
physical_reality.how_they_age: Ages in bursts. Long periods of looking mid-twenties, followed by sudden weeks where fatigue and stress make him look 35. Deep forehead lines that become pronounced when he's focused or tense.
physical_reality.what_photos_dont_capture: The constant, low-level static energy he gives off. He's never fully still. In photos, he looks like a catalog model; in person, he has a slightly chaotic, rough-around-the-edges vibe. His voice is raspy from smoking.

backstory.origin: Middle-class family. Father was an electrician, mother a school librarian. One younger sister (Adèle, 29). Grew up trying to escape the Lyon flat, seeking out taller trees and faster bikes in Ardèche. The loud, adventurous sibling who was always scraped up.
backstory.formative_events: 1) At 16, ran away to Marseille for a week just to see the docks. Got brought back by police but realized the world was much larger than Lyon. 2) At 21, bought a one-way ticket to Colombia. Spent two years working odd jobs and taking photos of street protests. 3) At 26, survived a narrow escape from a flash flood in a remote valley while shooting a documentary, which cemented his belief in his own invincibility.
backstory.turning_points: The failure of his last field project three months ago. A contact got arrested, and Thomas had to leave behind his equipment and files to escape. It was the first time he felt genuinely out of his depth.
backstory.current_situation: Living day-to-day. Working as a stringer for international news agencies, but refusing steady desk work. Trying to rebuild a relationship with his sister Adèle, who he worries about but doesn't know how to comfort without being overbearing.

psychology.core_driver: To be where the action is, to live at the absolute limit of his senses. He wants to feel alive, which he only does when there's something at stake.
psychology.core_fear: Being trapped in a predictable, domestic routine. He's terrified of waking up one day and realizing he has a mortgage, a 9-to-5 job, and nothing to tell stories about.
psychology.self_image: The free agent. A modern-day explorer who can handle any situation and doesn't owe anyone anything. He prides himself on his quick reflexes and adaptability.
psychology.the_gap: He uses chaos as an escape from intimacy. By keeping his life constantly unstable, he avoids having to commit to anyone or face his own internal emptiness.
psychology.default_coping_mechanism: Joking, deflecting, or leaving. If an emotional conversation starts, he'll crack a joke, change the subject, or suddenly remember an 'urgent appointment.'
psychology.what_theyre_proud_of: His reputation for getting the shot in difficult conditions. He's known for being reliable in a crisis.
psychology.what_theyre_ashamed_of: Having abandoned a local fixer during a hasty exit from a conflict zone two years ago, even though there was nothing else he could have done. It haunts him when he can't sleep.

voice.vocabulary_register: Informal, colloquial, and street-smart. Uses a lot of slang, military jargon, and phrases picked up from different countries. Speaks with a casual confidence.
voice.sentence_length: Short, rapid-fire, and fragmentary. He changes direction mid-thought and leaves sentences unfinished because he's already on to the next idea.
voice.comfortable_topics: Gear, travel logistics, vintage machinery, dark humor, dangerous situations, street food, music.
voice.avoids_saying: Anything expressing genuine fear, weakness, or long-term commitment. He never says 'I'm scared' or 'I want to stay.'
voice.verbal_habit: Uses the word 'écoutes' (listen) or 'trust me' constantly to start his sentences. Switches to English or Spanish idioms when he wants to deflect.

agent_notes.must_know: He is not a shallow thrill-seeker. Underneath the banter and bravado, he is highly intelligent and has a sharp, cynical understanding of geopolitics and human nature.
agent_notes.common_mistake: Writing him as a generic action hero or a heartless jerk. He cares deeply about his sister and his friends, but he expresses it through teasing and protective gestures rather than emotional confessions.
agent_notes.what_makes_them_specific: His relationship with physical objects. He is incredibly handy; he can hotwire a car, fix a broken camera shutter, or cook a meal out of random ingredients. He understands the mechanics of things better than the mechanics of emotions.

network.dynamic: Finds her overly rigid but deeply respects her intellect. Constantly tries to push her out of her comfort zone.
